mapper.insert:
insert into bio_sample_test_one_result_tb(id,sample_code,test_identify_primer, test_method,test_edit_type,test_no_trans_identity_primer, test_is_gene_modify_positive,test_if_fixed_point,test_if_copy_insert, test_fixed_point_type,test_donor_residue_info,test_insertion_site, test_elisa_result,test_qbzr_seq,test_edit_residue_info, test_user_id,test_user_name,test_time, create_time,test_channel,task_num, upload_num,remark) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testIdentifyPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testEditType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testNoTransIdentityPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testIsGeneModifyPositive,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testIfFixedPoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testIfCopyInsert,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testFixedPointType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testDonorResidueInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testInsertionSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testElisaResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testQbzrSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testEditResidueInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.testUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{item.testChannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.taskNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.uploadNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select
from bio_sample_test_one_result_tb where sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by id desc
